claims.summary: Projection-basis health should be explicitly observable.
claims.disposition: Verified projection_basis_health_v1 exposes deterministic norm and minimum-margin evidence.

claims.summary: Repeated projection from the same input should be bit-identical.
claims.disposition: Verified exact deterministic construction and repeated-output tests cover basis identity and margins.

claims.summary: The basis should be inspected over a broader input distribution for weak axes.
claims.disposition: Routed to an offline orthogonality, norm, and margin distribution review using fixed fixtures.

claims.summary: A new basis epoch or matrix could improve projection quality.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because changing the basis alters the live codec transform and compatibility identity.
